subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have remembered Our servants and handmaidens at all times, and called them unto the straight path from among Our servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا ذکرنا فی کل الاحیان عبادنا و امائنا و دعوناهم الی سواء السبیل من عبادی من
subcodes.subjects: @belief and denial, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement
